objective: Competitors of Europace (europace.de, German B2B mortgage/financing transaction platform) — for an investor evaluating Europace

hard_criteria.text: Operates a mortgage/consumer-financing brokerage platform, marketplace, or origination software competing for the same lenders/brokers/borrowers as Europace — in Germany/DACH or credibly expanding into it.
Currently operating (not shut down; if acquired, still operating as a distinct product).

soft_criteria.text: Direct product overlap with Europace's B2B platform model (vs adjacent: comparison portals, retail brokers, core-banking software).
Transaction volume, lender/broker network size, growth signals.

columns.desc: latest round or ownership (e.g. 'Series B, $40M' / 'subsidiary of X' / 'listed')
how they make money, one line
2-3 sentences an investor in Europace should know: positioning vs Europace, threats, recent moves

segments.label: similar_sites
segments.focus: Sites similar to europace.de per Similarweb similar-site data and 'Europace Alternativen' / competitor comparison pages.

segments.label: de_fintech_press
segments.focus: German fintech press (Finanz-Szene, Finance Forward, deutsche-startups.de) on mortgage/baufinanzierung platforms and Hypoport competitors — search in German.

segments.label: mortgage_saas
segments.focus: European mortgage-tech and loan-origination software vendors selling to banks and brokers (DACH first, then EU players entering DACH).

segments.label: broker_pools
segments.focus: German broker pools and B2B financing marketplaces (e.g. the ecosystems around Interhyp, Qualitypool, Fondsfinanz) that compete for Europace's broker base.
